subcodes.title: Ziyarat Hadrat-i-Rida
subcodes.first_line: I bear witness before God, thy Lord, the Lord of the heavens, the Lord of the earth, the Lord of all worlds, that thou art verily the manifest and just Leader whom God hath chosen [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هو الله المتکبر الفرد العلی الاظهر الاعلی. اشهد الله ربک رب السموات رب الارض رب العالمین بانک انت امام عدل مبین قد اصطفاک الله
subcodes.subjects: @justice and wrath of God, @prayer for justice and fairmindedness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @prayer for forgiveness
